site_information.name: Galapagos-Hotel
site_information.location: Puerto Villamil, Isabela, Galápagos Islands, Ecuador

owners.quote: The closest you'll get to the wild without leaving paradise.

site_information.description: Three stunning vacation houses designed for comfort and relaxation in Puerto Villamil, Isabela. Each house offers a unique experience with direct beach access or central town location.

villas.name: Yellow Heron House
villas.location: Centre of Puerto Villamil, directly on the beach

villas.name: Sandy Feet House
features: Patio with ocean view (waves touch the patio)

activities.name: Las Tintoreras
activities.description: Walk alongside white-tipped sharks resting in shallow lava channels and spot the iconic blue-footed boobies on the rocks.

activities.name: Turtle Island
activities.description: Dive or snorkel with hammerhead sharks and sea turtles in the pristine waters surrounding Isabela.

activities.name: Sierra Negra Volcano
activities.description: Hike to the rim of one of the world's largest active volcanic calderas. A dramatic landscape of black lava and mist.

activities.name: Breeding Centre
activities.description: Walk among Galápagos giant tortoises at the breeding and rehabilitation centre in Puerto Villamil.

activities.name: Concha de Perla
activities.description: Snorkel in a natural lagoon sheltered by mangroves. Sea lions, marine iguanas, and tropical fish.

activities.name: Los Tuneles
activities.description: Explore lava tube arches rising from the sea. One of Isabela's most iconic natural wonders.

activities.name: Wall of Tears
activities.description: Historic volcanic stone wall built by prisoners in the 1940s. A scenic hike through dry forest.

activities.name: Wetland Complex
activities.description: Flamingo lagoons, mangrove forests and shorebirds. A peaceful boardwalk through Isabela's wetlands.

getting_here.from_mainland: Fly to Baltra (GPS) or San Cristóbal (SCY) via Quito or Guayaquil
getting_here.to_isabela: Ferry from Santa Cruz (Puerto Ayora) — approx. 2 hours
getting_here.airport: Isabela Airport (GPS) — 10 min from Puerto Villamil
getting_here.note: Galapagos National Park entrance fee required (~$200 USD per person)
